option.name: originalContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22)
# # This file is generated only once, # and is not re-generated if converter is called multiple times. # # User is free to modify the file as much as necessary #
# Setup compiler settings set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11) set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON) set(CMAKE_C_EXTENSIONS ON)
# Define the build type if(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE) set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE "Debug") endif()
# Set the project name set(CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME LCD)
# Include toolchain file include("cmake/gcc-arm-none-eabi.cmake")
# Enable compile command to ease indexing with e.g. clangd set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS TRUE)
# Core project settings project(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}) message("Build type: " ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE})
# Enable CMake support for ASM and C languages enable_language(C ASM)
# Removed custom bin/ directory generation for remote sync compatibility
# Create an executable object type add_executable(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME})
# Add STM32CubeMX generated sources add_subdirectory(cmake/stm32cubemx)
# --- LVGL Configuration --- # 1. Include paths target_include_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/src ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/porting ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/src/extra )
# 2. Source files file(GLOB_RECURSE LVGL_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/src/*.c" ) target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${LVGL_SOURCES} ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/porting/lv_port_disp.c ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/porting/lv_port_indev.c ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/porting/lv_port_fs.c )
# --- Hardware Configuration --- # 1. Include paths target_include_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Handware ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LCD ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Core/Inc )
# 2. Source files file(GLOB HARDWARE_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Handware/*.c" "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LCD/*.c" ) target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${HARDWARE_SOURCES} )
# Link directories setup target_link_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE # Add user defined library search paths )
# Add sources to executable target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE # Add user sources here )
# Add include paths target_include_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE # Add user defined include paths )
# Add project symbols (macros) target_compile_definitions(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE # Add user defined symbols )
# Add linked libraries target_link_libraries(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} stm32cubemx
# Add user defined libraries )
# 打印编译出来的固件占用大小信息 add_custom_command(TARGET ${PROJECT_NAME} POST_BUILD COMMAND arm-none-eabi-size $<TARGET_FILE:${PROJECT_NAME}> COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E make_directory ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy $<TARGET_FILE:${PROJECT_NAME}> ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin/${PROJECT_NAME}.elf # 将 map 文件等一并复制到项目根目录的 bin 文件夹下，方便 CLion 自动同步回本地 COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E copy ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${PROJECT_NAME}.map ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin/ COMMENT "Printing sizes and copying artifacts to bin/ directory for local sync..." )

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22)
# # This file is generated only once, # and is not re-generated if converter is called multiple times. # # User is free to modify the file as much as necessary #
# Setup compiler settings set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11) set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON) set(CMAKE_C_EXTENSIONS ON)
# Define the build type if(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE) set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE "Debug") endif()
# Set the project name set(CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME LCD)
# Include toolchain file include("cmake/gcc-arm-none-eabi.cmake")
# Enable compile command to ease indexing with e.g. clangd set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS TRUE)
# Core project settings project(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}) message("Build type: " ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE})
# Enable CMake support for ASM and C languages enable_language(C ASM)
# Removed custom bin/ directory generation for remote sync compatibility
# Create an executable object type add_executable(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME})
# Add STM32CubeMX generated sources add_subdirectory(cmake/stm32cubemx)
# --- LVGL Configuration --- # 1. Include paths target_include_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/src ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/porting ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/src/extra )
# 2. Source files file(GLOB_RECURSE LVGL_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/src/*.c" ) target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${LVGL_SOURCES} ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/porting/lv_port_disp.c ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/porting/lv_port_indev.c ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LVGL/porting/lv_port_fs.c )
# --- Hardware Configuration --- # 1. Include paths target_include_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Handware ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LCD ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Core/Inc )
# 2. Source files file(GLOB HARDWARE_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/Handware/*.c" "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/LCD/*.c" ) target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${HARDWARE_SOURCES} )
# Link directories setup target_link_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE # Add user defined library search paths )
# Add sources to executable target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE # Add user sources here )
# Add include paths target_include_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE # Add user defined include paths )
# Add project symbols (macros) target_compile_definitions(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE # Add user defined symbols )
# Add linked libraries target_link_libraries(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} stm32cubemx
# Add user defined libraries )
# 打印编译出来的固件占用大小信息 add_custom_command(TARGET ${PROJECT_NAME} POST_BUILD COMMAND arm-none-eabi-size $<TARGET_FILE:${PROJECT_NAME}> COMMENT "Printing sizes..." )

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project version="4"> <component name="PublishConfigData" autoUpload="Always" serverName="远程开发" remoteFilesAllowedToDisappearOnAutoupload="false" autoUploadExternalChanges="true" showEqualInSync="true" showDifferentInSync="false"> <serverData> <paths name="远程主机 (7b434345-662f-464f-807c-94a102853437)"> <serverdata> <mappings> <mapping deploy="/tmp/tmp.I5nRtdLoE0/10Khz_Git" local="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git" /> </mappings> <excludedPaths> <excludedPath local="true" path="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git/cmake-build-debug-" /> <excludedPath local="true" path="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git/build/MinSizeRel" /> <excludedPath local="true" path="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git/build/RelWithDebInfo" /> <excludedPath local="true" path="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git/build/Debug" /> <excludedPath local="true" path="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git/build/Release" /> </excludedPaths> </serverdata> </paths> </serverData> <option name="myAutoUpload" value="ALWAYS" /> </component> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project version="4"> <component name="PublishConfigData" autoUpload="Always" serverName="远程开发" remoteFilesAllowedToDisappearOnAutoupload="false" autoUploadExternalChanges="true" showEqualInSync="true" showDifferentInSync="false"> <serverData> <paths name="远程主机 (7b434345-662f-464f-807c-94a102853437)"> <serverdata> <mappings> <mapping deploy="/tmp/tmp.I5nRtdLoE0/10Khz_Git" local="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git" /> </mappings> <excludedPaths> <excludedPath local="true" path="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git/build/RelWithDebInfo" /> <excludedPath local="true" path="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git/build/Release" /> <excludedPath local="true" path="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git/cmake-build-debug-" /> <excludedPath local="true" path="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git/build/MinSizeRel" /> <excludedPath local="true" path="D:/stm32/git/10Khz_Git/build/Debug" /> </excludedPaths> </serverdata> </paths> </serverData> <option name="myAutoUpload" value="ALWAYS" /> </component> </project>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
